# calcom-build

Scripts for building and binary releases of [cal.com](https://github.com/calcom/cal.com) for [YunoHost package](https://github.com/YunoHost-Apps/calcom_ynh).

## Building

Prebuilt are currently produced and published with the workflow [build_calcom.yml](https://github.com/CodeShakingSheep/calcom-build/blob/main/.github/workflows/build_calcom.yml)
